pi_items.source: examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/containerize_host_integration/setup_task.sh (app/app.py listens on port 8080 and docker-compose.yml maps 8080:8080)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/containerize_host_integration/setup_task.sh (app/app.py BACKEND_URL uses http://backend.legacy.internal:4567 and docker-compose comment asks for extra_hosts)
examples/docker_desktop_env/tasks/containerize_host_integration/setup_task.sh -> /usr/local/bin/legacy_server.py (JSON response data field is "Legacy Core Online")

privileged_info_summary: The legacy backend is a Python HTTP server created in /usr/local/bin/legacy_server.py (via setup_task.sh) listening on port 4567 and returning JSON whose data field is "Legacy Core Online"; the containerized frontend under /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/migration-task/app is wired to always call http://backend.legacy.internal:4567 and listens on port 8080, so the data served during the task is locally generated and synthetic.
